target.label: Force-feedback exo-glove (pair)
target.scope: wearable force-feedback exoskeleton glove for VR grasp resistance; design-thinking + 3D-printable assembly before STL
target.not_for: medical rehabilitation device, certified safety equipment, high-force industrial restraint

disclaimer: MRL-0.5 readiness evidence only; not manufacturing, flight, medical, or certification approval.

categories.name: overhang/support readiness
categories.note: overhang=45, supports=min, orientation=dorsal plate flat; finger linkages along Y; brake drums upright; band as open ring

categories.name: serviceability
categories.note: service access points 4, service terms 126, svg markers 0

loop_feedback:
Preserve MRL-0.5 manufacturing evidence for haptic_glove: keep datum, tolerance, service, inspection, and risk traces while improving geometry.
- Add or preserve datum/tolerance/inspection statements tied to visible geometry and assembly interfaces.
- Keep the design at educational mockup level; do not claim certification or real flight/manufacturing readiness.
